description: A porcelain fixed bridge is a non-removable dental appliance used to replace one or more missing teeth by anchoring artificial teeth to adjacent natural teeth.
main_benefits: Upgrade from removable partial denture to a permanent solution
bridge_type: Traditional porcelain fused to metal bridge
treatment_process: Preparation of anchoring teeth by removing a portion of enamel
Dental impression taken for lab fabrication
Temporary bridge placed for several weeks
Permanent bridge checked, adjusted, and cemented
durability: Highly durable and long-lasting with proper care
notes: Porcelain fixed bridges may need replacement or re-cementing over time due to normal wear.
